reason: Sample has balanced classes with substantial but moderate FP/FN; precision and recall both ~0.70 give F1 near the claimed 0.7156.
Values are uniform in [0,100] with sample mean ~50; sum of 1000 rows near 49709 (mean 49.7) is consistent.
Sample values are uniform in [0,100] averaging roughly 50, so a claimed mean of 71.15 is far too high.
Among true-positive rows there are many 1,0 misses (miss rate ~30%), implying recall closer to 0.70 not 0.85.
Scores separate the classes moderately with notable overlap and inversions, consistent with an AUC around 0.72.
Sample is error-heavy with abundant 0,1 and 1,0 mistakes giving F1 ~0.70, far below the claimed 0.8356.
